title: Bitdefender vs Norton 360: Which Antivirus is Better in 2026?
description: Head-to-head comparison of the two top-rated antivirus suites. We compare malware detection, features, pricing, and system impact to help you choose.

verdict.overallReasoning: While both antivirus suites offer excellent protection, Bitdefender edges out Norton 360 with its superior malware detection rate (99.9% vs 99.4%), lower system impact, and more affordable pricing. Norton 360 remains the better choice for users who need identity theft protection and a full-featured unlimited VPN. Choose Bitdefender for best protection at the best price; choose Norton for the most comprehensive all-in-one security suite.
